title: cnicus benedictus var. kotschyi
intro: Cnicus benedictus var. kotschyi, also known as the orach, is a biennial plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and alleviating menstrual cramps. Cnicus benedictus var. kotschyi can be prepared as a herbal tea or used in tincture form to harness its medicinal properties.
